title: Hot Key Action
description: Type definition for hotkey action configuration. This type allows mapping keyboard shortcuts to specific actions or functions, enabling keyboard-driven interactions in components.

data.content: export type AXHotKeyAction = { [key: string]: string | Function; parmas?: any };

props.name: AXHotKeyAction
props.description: Object type where keys represent keyboard shortcuts and values are either string method names or functions to execute. The 'parmas' property (optional) can contain additional parameters for the action.
